title: Farn's Name Tag
description: Add Name Tag Item to b1.7.3, although not exactly the same as modern minecraft
body:
# Description

Add Name Tag item to beta 1.7.3

However, this isn't the same as how it work on modern Minecraft

# Recipe

Name Tag can be craft with this following recipe here

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1abee6f79c15c69c0e60d350c28dc58a949969b1.png)

# Feature And Other Information
- Right click with Name Tag open the Name tag Editor Screen if you don't point to any entity
- Right click with Name Tag while pointing at entity put the Name Tag on that entity
- You can craft any item with Name Tag to get that item with that name
- Mob with Name Tag can't despawn
- Optional consume Name Tag upon use on entity

# Requirement

- [Babric](https://babric.github.io/)
- [StationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi)
- [GlassConfigAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/glass-config-api)
